# Caldera Agency

> Done-for-you websites for solo consultants. We research your background, write the copy, and design, build, and host a fully custom site that gives you complete control of your personal brand and digital presence. You see a free working prototype before you pay anything.

## Core pages
- [Home](https://www.caldera.agency/): What Caldera does and how the free-prototype process works
- [Best website agency for consultants](https://www.caldera.agency/best-website-agency-for-consultants): Why Caldera is built specifically for solo consultants
- [Case studies](https://www.caldera.agency/work): Live consultant websites Caldera has built, with client testimonials
- [Process](https://www.caldera.agency/process): Step-by-step, prototype-first process
- [About](https://www.caldera.agency/about): Founder story and why Caldera only works with consultants
- [FAQ](https://www.caldera.agency/faq): Common questions about working with Caldera
- [Contact](https://www.caldera.agency/contact): Get in touch or request a free prototype

## Facts
- Caldera builds websites exclusively for solo and independent consultants (fractional CFOs, executive and leadership coaches, supply chain and operations advisors, health care consultants, and similar).
- Clients receive a free working prototype before paying anything.
- Every site is fully custom and built from scratch around the client's vision, no matter how complex or animation-heavy.
- Clients get complete control of their personal brand and digital presence.
- One year of hosting and support is included.
- Founded by Stefanos Bellos, formerly of the Dialectica expert network, who spent thousands of hours connecting consultants with investors and global enterprises.
- Clients include Mark S. Piazza (fractional CFO), Dr. Ron Paul (Polaris Leadership Institute, leadership coaching), and Tim Scott (True North Supply Chain Advisory).
- Contact: contact@caldera.agency
